update_message: v1.0.1 is out — the .exe now ships with the warrant templates bundled inside. No more setup folder dance.
supporters: Be the first — buy me a coffee!

news.title: Welcome to WarrantFlow
news.body: Thanks for using WarrantFlow. It's free, runs entirely from your USB, and keeps your data encrypted on your device. Found a bug or have a feature idea? Reach out anytime.
